test.command: cargo test -p swell-llm -p swell-orchestrator -p swell-validation -p swell-integration-tests -- --test-threads=4
test.details: swell-llm: 102 tests passed; swell-orchestrator: 869 tests passed; swell-validation: 347 tests passed (timed out but all visible passed); swell-integration-tests: 12 tests passed

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add guidance that discover_instruction_files() should walk upward from CWD to find instruction files in parent directories, not just check the repo_path directly. This would allow .swell/skills/ and instruction files to be found in parent directories when working in nested project structures.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature prompt-instruction-discovery implements discover_instruction_files() that only checks repo_path directly (crates/swell-orchestrator/src/agents.rs:2654). The requirement states 'walking from workspace root' which implies parent traversal.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Worker for prompt-integration-tests properly used ValidationPipeline::add_gate() API discovered during implementation. No gaps in documented knowledge.
swell-integration-tests crate follows existing workspace crate conventions (Cargo.toml, src/lib.rs pattern).
ScenarioMockLlm uses SwellError::LlmError for exhaustion errors rather than a dedicated ScenarioError variant. The ScenarioError enum exists but is unused.
